name: Shriners Children's 500
comments: Christopher Bell has won the Shriners Children's 500 at Phoenix Raceway, his 12th victory in the NASCAR Cup Series. Prior to the start of the race, the following vehicle(s) dropped to the rear of the field under penalty for the reason(s) indicated: No. 71 (Unapproved Adjustments).
